query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_places, COUNT(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as with_description, COUNT(CASE WHEN highlights IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as with_highlights, COUNT(CASE WHEN amenities IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as with_amenities FROM places;
